text:
The x11-wm/hs-xmonad port has the following configuration options enabled:

[x] DOCS Build and/or install documentation
[x] DYNAMIC Add Support for dynamic linking

The lang/ghc port has the following configuration options enabled:

[x] DOCS Install HTML Documentation
[x] DYNAMIC Add support for dynamic linking
[x] PROFILE Add support for performance profiling


I looked for a build log in the working directory but couldn't find it.  Maybe you can clue me in on where to find it so i can provide it for you.
